metaLineTemplate: You chose {idealTitle} as a societal value you want no matter the circumstances you will be born into.

idealNarrationMap.liberty: We're clarifying where you draw the line on personal freedom.
idealNarrationMap.equality: We're clarifying what equal treatment means in practice.
idealNarrationMap.fairness: We're clarifying what fair outcomes look like.
idealNarrationMap.prosperity: We're clarifying what economic well-being means.
idealNarrationMap.security: We're clarifying what safety and stability require.
idealNarrationMap.sustainability: We're clarifying what protecting future generations means.
idealNarrationMap.community: We're clarifying what belonging and connection require.

reflectionBucketsGeneric.low: That suggests you're cautious about prioritizing this.
reflectionBucketsGeneric.high: That suggests you prioritize this strongly.

reflectionBucketsLiberty.low: That suggests you're comfortable with more limits on freedom when needed.
reflectionBucketsLiberty.mid: That suggests you want freedom with some guardrails.
reflectionBucketsLiberty.high: That suggests you lean toward wide personal freedom, even when it's messy.

unansweredGeneric.sentenceA: We're clarifying what this means in real situations.
unansweredGeneric.sentenceB: Choose what feels true for you — we'll follow up based on your choice.

unansweredLiberty.sentenceA: We're clarifying where you draw the line on personal freedom.
unansweredLiberty.sentenceB: Choose what feels true for you — we'll follow up based on your choice.
